overall_assessment: not_ready: one blocking test-quality gap remains in the TODO contract
recommended_path: Amend the TODO before implementation continues so real-backend Flutter/navigation evidence is a mandatory validation gate, not preferred or implied evidence.

findings.title: Real-backend Flutter/navigation evidence was not a hard delivery gate
findings.rationale: The TODO identified app inviteables rendering, occurrence changes, and independent status loading as needing real backend evidence, but the required runtime lane was only ADB-preferred and the CI-equivalent matrix did not name a mandatory Flutter integration/device/web command.
findings.suggested_action: Add an explicit validation gate and local-equivalent command requiring no-mock real-backend Flutter navigation evidence before Local-Implemented/promotion.
